title: cirsium scariosum
intro: Cirsium scariosum, also known as Woolly Thistle, is a species of thistle native to the western United States. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cirsium scariosum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in topical applications such as salves and poultices.
